channel.title: flove making-of — crypto questions
channel.description: New crypto design questions from flove interviews.

item.title: How should crypto key recovery/rotation work for nety identity?
item.description:
• Social recovery — Key recovery via N-of-M social vouchers (friends vouch for you). Standard Web3 approach. • Sidechain — Dedicated key-recovery sidechain — more robust but heavier infrastructure. • Defer — Don't design yet — keep it abstract until the basic identity ladder works.
★ decided: — · ◇ recommended: Defer
